issues.description: GiveDon action is incomplete. The effect states 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active' — this requires SearchDeck to retrieve from deck, not just GiveDon. Should be SearchDeck with count:1, source:'DON!!Deck', then attach/set active.

Second effect with trigger:'Trigger' is undefined and redundant. The card text describes a single Main effect with two sequential actions (KO, then add DON!!). There is no second trigger mentioned. This effect should be removed.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' should include 'maxCost' condition. Current structure is unclear — should be {'scope':'OpponentCharacter','maxCost':6} or similar with proper cost filtering.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less, then add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
